response.justification: Bogdan brings over 12 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tooling, directly aligning with the required stack. His work on AI-agent infrastructure at Naver and open-source GIS platforms demonstrates strong architecture skills and user-centric delivery. His extensive testing, CI/CD, and open-source contributions further validate his engineering rigor and collaboration aptitude.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS, Docker)
Proven track record in AI-agent development and internal tooling at Naver and Tencent
Strong open-source contributions, testing expertise (Vitest-like tools), and dev-ops practices
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalents (Node.js, testing frameworks) are present
German language skill is only basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
Long tenure at self-initiated projects (MercadoLibre) may raise questions about current focus or scalability of contributions
